# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Public API behavior is covered by tests when relevant.
- [ ] `make test` passes.
- [ ] `make build` passes.
- [ ] `make eslint` passes when linted code files were changed.
- [ ] `make actionlint` passes when GitHub Actions files were changed.
- [ ] Documentation is updated when behavior or public API changed.
- [ ] Commits are split by logical intent and follow Conventional Commits.

## Notes

Add reviewer notes, follow-ups, or known limitations.
